rationale: Spec says include any user-specified write concern values in commands; driver skips GLE when w=0 and j=true.
Static library linker failure on Mac OS; build/packaging issue with no spec involvement.
SDAM/SS specs define timeout parameters and configurable intervals; driver had incorrect units and no configurable parameters.
SDAM spec requires minHeartbeatFrequencyMS=500; driver had 10ms, a direct spec value violation.
Compile-time configure switch for SHM performance counters; build/packaging change with no spec involvement.
Internal stream handler API differentiation for PHP persistent connections; language-binding implementation detail, not spec behavior.
Solaris Studio compiler warning; build issue with no spec involvement.
Missing documentation pages for gridfs and database API methods; docs bug, no spec conformance issue.
Configure script labels stable release as unstable; versioning/build issue, no spec involvement.
ISO C pedantic compiler warnings; build/portability issue with no spec involvement.
Inconsistent treatment of 0 in timeout URI options; cannot identify specific connection-string spec rule violated.
Driver spins infinitely on TLS hangup instead of failing fast; implementation error handling bug, no specific spec rule violated.
bson_t memory alignment issue causing misaligned allocations; internal memory/portability bug, not a spec deviation.
Broken GCC version check prevents compilation with GCC 5; build issue, no spec involvement.
Explicitly described as 'two bugs in SDAM and Server Selection specs': no retry after failure, no minHeartbeatFrequencyMS pause.
Function returns non-NULL on error contrary to its documentation; C API contract bug, not a cross-driver spec rule.
User request to change multi default to true; API design preference, not a spec nonconformance.
Missing __sync intrinsic for 32-bit values on i386; compiler/architecture build issue, no spec involvement.
Incorrect version number in GitHub README; documentation error, no spec involvement.
SCRAM uses SHA1() instead of EVP wrappers for FIPS compliance; implementation detail, spec doesn't mandate the OpenSSL API used.
Workaround for server-side localhost exception narrowing in MongoDB 2.7.1; server behavior change, not a driver spec violation.
CRUD spec requires all bulk write result fields (nRemoved etc.) always present; driver omits them when no ops of that type executed.
CRUD/bulk write spec requires splitting batches under maxMessageSizeBytes; driver sends 24MB command exceeding 16MB limit.
Bulk write spec requires batching consecutive same-type operations; driver only batches inserts, not updates or deletes.
Undefined reference to bson_atomic_int64_add on armv7l; build/linker failure, no spec involvement.
GSSAPI auth broken due to inverted SASL step condition; auth spec requires functioning GSSAPI mechanism, driver fails entirely.
BSON spec requires lossless round-trip of arrays; libbson truncates large arrays (1250 elements read as 1185), corrupting data.
Reconnect attempts multiply causing long waits; behavior anomaly in SDAM implementation but no specific spec rule identified as violated.
Ticket explicitly cites 'CRUD spec's error handling portion... mandated by the spec'; bulk write error detail not accessible via C API.
Driver spec requires using maxWriteBatchSize from isMaster; driver hardcodes 1000 instead, ignoring server-advertised limit.
mongoc_client_get_database_names fails to populate bson_error_t on error; C API contract bug, not a cross-driver spec rule.
Macro typos in libbson man pages; documentation formatting issue, no spec involvement.
Segfault when cursor hint invalidated after primary shutdown; crash/implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
bson_as_json outputs trailing zeros and whitespace; Improvement ticket for output quality, no specific Extended JSON spec rule cited.
Documentation update to replace deprecated API reference; docs change, no spec conformance issue.
Typo in libbson performance docs code sample; documentation error, no spec involvement.
sasl_client_init called per-connection instead of globally; SASL library usage bug, no MongoDB driver spec rule violated.
Flawed SASL version comparison logic at compile time; implementation bug in build system, not a driver spec deviation.
Infinite loop on invalid UTF-8 in bson_utf8_escape_for_json; robustness/security bug, no spec rule defines this failure mode.
CRUD spec requires correct error index in writeErrors; write command path reports index 0 instead of correct 1 for second op.
C89 compilation error from variable declaration after statement; build issue, no spec involvement.
Missing documentation for bulk_operation_execute result contents; docs bug, no spec conformance issue.
Unused macro BSON_PTHREAD_ONCE_INIT_NEEDS_BRACES in libbson; code cleanup, no spec involvement.
CRUD spec requires nInserted to count only successful inserts; driver increments it even for server-rejected documents.
Wire protocol OP_INSERT continueOnError flag must respect caller's choice; driver always sets it regardless of MONGOC_INSERT_NONE flag.
Bulk write spec requires batching to stay within server limits; legacy insert_bulk sends one operation per round trip instead.
Empty description; insufficient detail to identify a specific spec rule. Paired fix with CDRIVER-714 but no standalone rationale.
Segfault in _mongoc_cluster_node_destroy on client pool push; crash/implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Wrong function name in mongoc_collection_find docs example; documentation typo, no spec involvement.
CRUD spec: ordered bulk write must stop after any failure; driver continues past oversized doc as if unordered.
